summary.source: Mocked Jenkins daily build catalog generated for the static Factory Fit Profiler demo.
summary.assessmentPurpose: Profile CI/CD demographics and DevOps maturity signals before SDLC modernization.

maturityDimensions.label: Pipeline as code adoption
maturityDimensions.description: Jenkinsfile or shared-library driven jobs rather than hand-edited freestyle jobs.

maturityDimensions.label: Build health and reliability
maturityDimensions.description: Success rate, unstable builds, aborted jobs, queue time, and flaky-test pressure.

maturityDimensions.label: Quality and security gates
maturityDimensions.description: Automated tests, coverage, static/security scanning, SBOM creation, and artifact signing.

maturityDimensions.label: Flow efficiency
maturityDimensions.description: Lead time, job duration, wait time, deployable artifact creation, and recovery time.

maturityDimensions.label: Agentic SDLC readiness
maturityDimensions.description: Traceability, standardized job metadata, compliant secrets handling, and safe automation hooks.
